foodkeeper_basis: Leafy greens/berries 2-5 days refrigerated (USDA FoodKeeper: Lettuce 1-2 wk, Strawberries 2-3 d, Broccoli 3-5 d)
Milk ~use-by 1 wk, Yogurt 1-2 wk refrigerated (USDA FoodKeeper)
Fresh eggs in shell 3-5 weeks refrigerated (USDA FoodKeeper)
Raw chicken/ground poultry 1-2 days refrigerated (USDA FoodKeeper)
Bread 3-5 days at pantry temperature (USDA FoodKeeper)
